title: Add Appx Package for all users
cmd: cmd /c echo "Add appx package %1 for all users?" & pause & powershell.exe -Command "Start-Process cmd.exe -ArgumentList '\"/c\"','"','dism.exe','-Online','-Add-ProvisionedAppxPackage','-PackagePath:%1','-SkipLicense','"','&pause' -Verb RunAs"
name: AddAppxPackageForAllUsers
